---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] <short description>"
labels: enhancement, needs-discussion
assignees: ''
---

## 🚀 Problem / Motivation
<!-- Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe clearly and concisely.
     Example: "I'm always frustrated when I have to manually re-enter booking details after a failed payment..." -->

## 💡 Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe the feature you'd like to see. Be as specific as possible — include API signatures,
     UI mockups, data models, or workflow diagrams if helpful. -->

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
<!-- Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.
     Why are they insufficient compared to your proposed solution? -->

## 📦 Affected Service(s)
<!-- Which microservice(s) or app(s) would need to change?
     e.g. booking_service, mobile_app, admin_web -->

## 🎯 Acceptance Criteria
<!-- Optional but helpful — describe what "done" looks like. -->
- [ ] ...
- [ ] ...

## 📎 Additional Context
<!-- Any other context, links to related issues, external documentation, or prior art. -->
